name: Mangalares Del Mundo Maya
overview: Sasha Sökol is the voice that gives life to one of the most extraordinary narratives that betrays the daily life and the role of the mangroves in the Mexican peninsula, all in the research and image collection that meets in the documentary work: “Mangroves of the Mayan world. ”

trailers.title: Manglares del Mundo Maya | Grandes Documentales
